summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 11 - Discord Bot integration, Auto-Backup settings relocation, Schema changes. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%), 1 skipped. All frontend UI elements verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/settings/schema correctly returns 'discord' section with discord_webhooks and discord_bot categories
GET /api/settings/schema correctly removes 'client' section and client_mouse/video/graphics/sound categories
GET /api/settings/schema correctly places gameplay_client_game under 'gameplay' section
GET /api/discord/bot returns {enabled, token_set, token_preview, status} structure
PUT /api/discord/bot with empty token accepts but keeps token_set=false
PUT /api/discord/bot with fake token persists and attempts bot start (status.error becomes 'login_failed')
PUT /api/discord/bot with enabled=false stops the bot
GET /api/servers/{id}/metrics includes 'players' and 'max_players_live' keys (null when server stopped)
PUT /api/servers/{id}/automation correctly persists backup_enabled, backup_interval_min, backup_keep_count
POST /api/servers/{id}/stop marks expected-stop (no crash backup created)
ServerCard players metric displays N/M format (e.g., '0/64')
AutoSavePanel correctly moved from AutomationEditor to BackupsView
Discord section tab visible in ServerDashboard with Webhooks and Bot sub-categories
Client Game category correctly appears under Gameplay section (not in separate Client section)
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state. PUT /api/setup with {is_admin_confirmed:true, selected_disk:'/', manager_path:'/tmp/LGSSManagers', completed:true} to setup. POST /api/servers/{id}/install to install server (simulated on Linux).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 adds: (1) Discord Bot integration - GET/PUT /api/discord/bot endpoints, token management, bot start/stop, status polling. (2) Auto-backup settings moved from AutomationEditor to BackupsView - AutoSavePanel component with data-testid='auto-save-panel', interval input (data-testid='auto-backup-interval-input'), keep input (data-testid='auto-backup-keep-input'), toggle (data-testid='auto-backup-toggle'), save button (data-testid='auto-backup-save-btn'). (3) Schema changes - 'discord' section added with discord_webhooks and discord_bot categories, 'client' section removed, client_mouse/video/graphics/sound categories removed, gameplay_client_game moved to 'gameplay' section. (4) Server metrics now include 'players' and 'max_players_live' keys for live player count display. (5) ServerCard displays players as N/M format (e.g., '0/64'). Key data-testids: discord-bot-settings, discord-bot-token-input, discord-bot-enabled-toggle, discord-bot-save-btn, auto-save-panel, auto-backup-interval-input, auto-backup-keep-input, auto-backup-toggle, auto-backup-save-btn, section-tab-discord, panel-discord_bot, panel-discord_webhooks, panel-gameplay_client_game.

settings_schema.discord_section: Present with discord_webhooks and discord_bot categories

discord_bot.put_empty_token: PUT with empty token accepts, token_set stays false
discord_bot.put_fake_token: PUT with fake token persists, attempts start, status.error='login_failed'

expected_stop.no_crash_backup: Verified no crash backup created after /stop

auto_save_panel_in_backups.save_works: Clicking save persists values via PUT /automation

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIs. All features are REAL: Discord bot endpoints, automation backup settings, server metrics.
